title: ITALY enforcement action against Euro Bangla Minimarket in Jesi (1,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 1,000 on Euro Bangla Minimarket in Jesi. The controller installed video surveillance equipment, which can be used to monitor employees. However, the controller failed to obtain the necessary authorisation from the labour inspectorate. Legal basis: Art....
